column1: # Jaw Worm A20 hand-derived fixture (task A3.2).
# Generated by tests/fixtures/gen_jaw_worm_fixture.py -- do not edit by hand.
# Draw-counting convention: init = decision #1 (forced Chomp, 1 aiRng.random(99)
# draw IGNORED). Each of the 20 turns executes turn K then rolls decision #(K+1):
# 1 aiRng.random(99) draw + (on tiebreak branches) 1 aiRng.randomBoolean draw, so
# aiRng.counter after turn K is variable. monsterHpRng drawn once at init (counter 1).
# Move ids: CHOMP=1, BELLOW=2, THRASH=3. s0/s1 are unsigned decimal uint64.
